description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a slightly rounded body and a polygonal handle attached to one side. The front of the cup features a humorous printed image of a person with a digitally altered head, accompanied by the text 'Never Mind the Scandal and Libel.' The handle is angular and geometric, contrasting with the otherwise smooth and gently curved surface of the cup. The rim is thick and rounded, providing a comfortable edge for drinking. The cup's surface is matte with a subtle sheen, and the interior appears to be the same material and color as the exterior.
description: A white ceramic cup with a polygonal handle and a humorous printed image and text on the front. The surface is matte and the rim is thick and rounded.
description_view_0: Front view showing the printed image and text, as well as the polygonal handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered, no visible image or text, showing the smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_2: Angled side view highlighting the polygonal handle and the cup's smooth, rounded body.
description_view_3: Side view opposite the handle, showing the plain, curved surface with a small portion of the printed text visible at the edge.
